detectors.description:
Reentrancy in COIN_BOX.Collect(uint256) (COIN_BOX.sol#97-123):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (COIN_BOX.sol#111)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- acc.balance -= _am (COIN_BOX.sol#115)
	COIN_BOX.Acc (COIN_BOX.sol#21) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- COIN_BOX.Acc (COIN_BOX.sol#21)
	- COIN_BOX.Collect(uint256) (COIN_BOX.sol#97-123)
	- COIN_BOX.Put(uint256) (COIN_BOX.sol#77-93)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [COIN_BOX.Collect(uint256)](COIN_BOX.sol#L97-L123):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.call.value(_am)()](COIN_BOX.sol#L111)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [acc.balance -= _am](COIN_BOX.sol#L115)
	[COIN_BOX.Acc](COIN_BOX.sol#L21) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [COIN_BOX.Acc](COIN_BOX.sol#L21)
	- [COIN_BOX.Collect(uint256)](COIN_BOX.sol#L97-L123)
	- [COIN_BOX.Put(uint256)](COIN_BOX.sol#L77-L93)

detectors.description:
COIN_BOX.Put(uint256) (COIN_BOX.sol#77-93) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- now + _lockTime > acc.unlockTime (COIN_BOX.sol#89)

detectors.description:

	Dangerous comparisons:
